untranslatable_reason: The Abandoned Baby pattern requires multi-candle pattern recognition (doji on current bar + specific prior/subsequent candle relationships) which cannot be expressed using single-bar indicators and allowed operators. The pattern definition requires: (1) identification of a true doji (open=high=low=close), (2) gap positioning relative to adjacent candles, and (3) reversal confirmation across multiple bars. Current indicator set lacks multi-bar pattern matching capability.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture doji element (body==0) and short entry at lower open with -6.03% stop loss from parameters, but full Abandoned Baby pattern logic (gaps, adjacent candle positioning, reversal context) cannot be properly encoded. Recommend: either add pattern_recognition indicators or use price_action conditional logic with prev_close/prev_high/prev_low comparisons for gap detection.
